# LaserHairRemovalUAE.com

> The UAE's independent guide to laser hair removal. We compare clinics, prices, safety guidance and treatment options across Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah.

## Key pages
- [Cost Guide](https://laserhairremovaluae.com/cost/): 2026 prices by body part and city
- [Diode vs Alexandrite vs Nd:YAG](https://laserhairremovaluae.com/diode-vs-alexandrite/): laser technology comparison
- [Laser for Dark Skin](https://laserhairremovaluae.com/dark-skin/): safer options for darker skin tones
- [Best Clinics in Dubai](https://laserhairremovaluae.com/clinics/dubai/): Dubai clinic directory
- [How Many Sessions](https://laserhairremovaluae.com/sessions/): treatment planning guide

## Facts
- Laser hair removal in the UAE typically costs AED 95-1,600 per session depending on body area.
- Most people need 6-8 sessions for visible long-term hair reduction.
- Nd:YAG lasers are commonly preferred for darker Fitzpatrick IV-VI skin tones.

## Contact
- Email: hello@laserhairremovaluae.com
